title: B.S.E
description: this modpack keeps the gameplay vanilla while adding a few new features
body:
WELCOME THE B.S.E

what is this modpack?

I was looking for a modpack that kept the gameplay of basic survival Minecraft while also enhancing the game, but I couldn't find one to my liking, so i made my own!

what kind of mods does it contain?

  • better combat
  • iris shaders
  • yung's structure mods
  • ambient sounds & sound physics
  • and more...

will this get popular?

probably not, but for the people that see this, please enjoy my modpack!
